overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a Western-themed video game depicting a stormy night in a frontier town. The player walks through muddy streets lined with wooden buildings and warm lanterns, approaching a dead body lying in the rain-soaked dirt.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night in a frontier town, with the player walking down a muddy street lined by a wooden fence. Warm lantern light from a saloon contrasts with the dark storm clouds where lightning periodically flashes.

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the town, passing covered wooden boardwalks with stairs leading to upper levels. The storm continues with another lightning flash as the camera progresses toward the distant lit buildings.

events.description: approaching dead body, game UI prompt appears to pick up stranger

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a dead body lying in the muddy street near a wooden porch. The camera slows and stops as a game UI prompt appears, indicating the option to pick up the stranger. The stormy atmosphere persists with wet ground reflecting the warm lantern light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy frontier town that transitions from a wide street view to a close-up discovery of a fallen stranger. It begins with a walk down a muddy road lined by a wooden fence, where the dark storm clouds and periodic lightning flashes contrast with the warm glow of a nearby saloon. As the camera progresses deeper into the town, it passes under covered wooden boardwalks and stairs leading to upper levels while the storm persists. The scene then shifts toward a wooden porch, slowing its pace as it approaches a dead body lying in the rain-soaked dirt. Finally, the camera comes to a halt over the body, with the wet ground reflecting the lantern light as a game UI prompt appears.
